page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 4 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 30.0 GB of RAM, providing 7.5 GB of memory per core. For acceleration, it includes a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of a 472 GB SSD, and the instance offers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates a clear contrast between CPU-bound tasks and GPU-accelerated workloads. Standard CPU performance is relatively low, with stress-ng single-core and multi-core benchmarks falling into the bottom 10% and 25% respectively. Memory bandwidth and database operations also register in the lower tiers. However, the integrated NVIDIA P100 GPU delivers strong performance in specialized tasks, achieving top-tier results in large language model inference. Specifically, prompt processing for both 135M and 7B models, as well as text generation for the 7B model, rank in the top 10% of tested systems.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a specialized entry-level GPU option. While the older Intel Xeon CPU and memory architecture limit its performance in general-purpose compute or high-throughput database tasks, the bundled local SSD and dedicated GPU VRAM make it a viable, resource-dense choice for legacy GPU workloads. It is best suited for deep learning inference, small-to-medium scale LLM tasks, and GPU-accelerated parallel processing workloads that do not require the latest generation of tensor cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 4 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 30.0 GB of RAM, a 472 GB local SSD, and a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Acceleration is provided by a single NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. While standard CPU and memory benchmarks place this instance in the lower performance tiers, its GPU capabilities deliver top-tier results for large language model inference, particularly in prompt processing and text generation for medium-sized models. This hardware profile makes the instance a cost-effective choice for specialized workloads such as deep learning inference, model prototyping, and parallel processing tasks that benefit from dedicated GPU acceleration and local SSD storage without requiring the highest-end modern CPU compute.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 4 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 30 GB RAM, a 472 GB local SSD, and an NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for deep learning workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c4g1.xlarge features 4 vCPUs, 30 GB RAM, a 472 GB SSD, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU, optimized for deep learning inference.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance featuring a dedicated NVIDIA P100 processor and local SSD storage for efficient model inference and parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
1x NVIDIA Pascal P100 GPU with 16 GB of dedicated VRAM
30.0 GB of system memory and 472 GB of local SSD storage
Top-tier benchmark performance for small and medium LLM inference
3 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
Best suited for deep learning inference and GPU-accelerated parallel processing
